docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY MITCHEL, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, CONSUELO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-02-2015 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (10 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF MITCHEL, ANGELA
DECLARATION OF ANGELA MITCHEL RE: RESET FILED BY PLAINTIFF MITCHEL, ANGELA
TRIAL RESET TO MAR-12-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF FEB-02-2015 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF MITCHEL, ANGELA AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, CONSUELO
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-14-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, CONSUELO

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-12-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-12-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-12-2015 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MITCHEL, ANGELA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, CONSUELO $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $45.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $545.00, "INCLUDED IN THE JUDGMENT ARE STATUTORY DAMAGES IN THE AMOUNT OF $200 DUE TO DEFENDANTS FAILURE TO COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE SECTION 1950.5(C) IN BAD FAITH," PER JUDGE DONALD MITCHELL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT SANDOVAL, CONSUELO
